gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just swept through the README, updating the latest news and recent apps sections to keep everything fresh.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file, refreshing the Latest News and Recent Apps sections.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's landing page up-to-date with the latest community creations and platform updates.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (Monitor Robot) updating a giant text document or bulletin board, with Polly the bee helping out by pinning new apps to the board.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning new pixelated app icons to a wooden bulletin board. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
